# Template: CODEOWNERS

## Generation Logic

Build from Component Design (C4 L3) module ownership.

## Template

```
# {System Name} — Code Ownership
# Generated by AI-DWG | Source: Component Design (C4 L3)
#
# Format: <pattern> <owner>
# Adjust owners for your platform (GitHub @teams, GitLab groups, etc.)

# Governance (architect review required)
/.kiro/steering/                @{architect-team}
/CODEOWNERS                     @{tech-lead}
/PROJECT_INSTRUCTIONS.md        @{tech-lead}
/DEFINITION_OF_DONE.md          @{tech-lead}

# Modules
/src/{module-1}/                @{owner-1}
/src/{module-2}/                @{owner-2}
/src/{module-n}/                @{owner-n}

# Shared kernel (broad review)
/src/shared/                    @{architect-team}

# Infrastructure
/docker-compose.yml             @{devops-team}
/.github/                       @{tech-lead}

# Database migrations
/src/**/migrations/             @{tech-lead}
```

## Rules

1. Every module folder has an owner
2. Shared kernel requires architect review
3. Steering files require architect review
4. If owners unknown: use `# TODO: Assign team ownership`
